title: Les misérables Tome IV: L'idylle rue Plumet et l'épopée rue Saint-Denis
summaries: "Les misérables Tome IV: L'idylle rue Plumet et l'épopée rue Saint-Denis" by Victor Hugo is the fourth volume of an epic historical novel first published in 1862. This installment continues the story of ex-convict Jean Valjean's quest for redemption as events build toward the 1832 June Rebellion in Paris. The novel examines law and grace, justice and love, while following the intersecting lives of characters caught between personal struggles and revolutionary upheaval in nineteenth-century France.
